title: Matte Diorama
description: Ce style imite un rendu 3D contemporain et lisse avec une esthétique mate rappelant les figurines en vinyle. Il se caractérise par un éclairage de studio doux, des formes géométriques arrondies et une atmosphère chaleureuse avec une occlusion ambiante marquée qui ancre les éléments dans une disposition spatiale épurée façon diorama.
description_en: This style mimics a contemporary, smooth 3D render with a matte, vinyl-toy aesthetic. It features soft studio lighting, rounded geometric forms, and a warm atmosphere with distinct ambient occlusion that grounds the elements in a clean, diorama-like spatial arrangement.
description_fr: Ce style imite un rendu 3D contemporain et lisse avec une esthétique mate rappelant les figurines en vinyle. Il se caractérise par un éclairage de studio doux, des formes géométriques arrondies et une atmosphère chaleureuse avec une occlusion ambiante marquée qui ancre les éléments dans une disposition spatiale épurée façon diorama.
prompt: A pristine, contemporary 3D illustration rendered with a matte, vinyl-toy aesthetic, evoking high-end designer collectibles and modern stylized digital dioramas. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The visual execution must occupy the absolute entire dedicated space, extending full bleed to all four corners with no borders, frames, or canvas edges. Lighting consists of a soft, diffused studio setup with a gentle key light that produces smooth, gradient-like transitions across rounded surfaces, completely avoiding harsh specular highlights. Strong, precise ambient occlusion grounds every element, casting soft but distinct drop shadows that establish a tangible, stage-like diorama depth. The color science relies on a warm, creamy {{primary_color}} ambient base, beautifully contrasted by highly saturated, localized pops of {{accent_color}} and balanced by muted {{secondary_color}} midtones. Materials mimic tactile, non-reflective substances such as soft marshmallow silicone, smooth matte plastics, and finely sanded wood, all featuring perfectly rounded bevels and fillet edges. Edges are razor-sharp, anti-aliased, and geometrically perfect, creating crisp silhouettes that pop against the environment. The spatial dynamics utilize a flattened, long-lens perspective, giving the scene an isometric-adjacent, meticulously arranged diorama feel. The final output has a flawless, denoised render quality with an ultra-clean, sterile, yet invitingly tactile atmosphere. 3d render, matte finish, vinyl toy aesthetic, ambient occlusion, soft studio lighting, diorama perspective, rounded geometry, pastel grading, subsurface scattering, pristine topology, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame
prompt_removebg: A pristine, contemporary 3D illustration rendered with a matte, vinyl-toy aesthetic, evoking high-end designer collectibles and modern stylized digital dioramas, composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The visual execution must seamlessly integrate with the flat {{background_color}} backdrop, explicitly allowing intentional overflow where parts of the {{subject}} can extend beyond the visible frame and be dynamically cropped by the image boundaries. Lighting consists of a soft, diffused studio setup with a gentle key light that produces smooth, gradient-like transitions across rounded surfaces, completely avoiding harsh specular highlights. Strong, precise ambient occlusion grounds every element, casting soft but distinct drop shadows directly onto the {{background_color}} surface to establish a tangible, stage-like depth. The color science relies on a warm, creamy {{primary_color}} ambient base, beautifully contrasted by highly saturated, localized pops of {{accent_color}} and balanced by muted {{secondary_color}} midtones. Materials mimic tactile, non-reflective substances such as soft marshmallow silicone, smooth matte plastics, and finely sanded wood, all featuring perfectly rounded bevels and fillet edges. Edges are razor-sharp, anti-aliased, and geometrically perfect, creating crisp silhouettes that pop against the {{background_color}} environment. The spatial dynamics utilize a flattened, long-lens perspective, giving the scene an isometric-adjacent, meticulously arranged diorama feel. The final output has a flawless, denoised render quality with an ultra-clean, sterile, yet invitingly tactile atmosphere. 3d render, matte finish, vinyl toy aesthetic, ambient occlusion, soft studio lighting, diorama perspective, rounded geometry, pastel grading, subsurface scattering, pristine topology
background_prompt: A pristine, empty 3D diorama environment rendered with a matte, vinyl-toy aesthetic. The scene features a smooth, seamless studio backdrop bathed in warm, diffused lighting. Gentle gradients of {{primary_color}} fill the space, accented by soft {{secondary_color}} shadows and subtle {{accent_color}} ambient light bounces. The floor and walls blend seamlessly with perfect, rounded transitions, creating an infinite, sterile, yet invitingly soft spatial depth. High-end rendering with strong ambient occlusion and a flawless, denoised finish.
background_prompt_removebg: A pristine, empty 3D diorama environment rendered with a matte, vinyl-toy aesthetic. The scene features a smooth, seamless studio backdrop bathed in warm, diffused lighting. Gentle gradients of {{primary_color}} fill the space, accented by soft {{secondary_color}} shadows and subtle {{accent_color}} ambient light bounces. The floor and walls blend seamlessly with perfect, rounded transitions, creating an infinite, sterile, yet invitingly soft spatial depth. High-end rendering with strong ambient occlusion and a flawless, denoised finish. In the foreground, floating in front of the invisible subject, is a sleek, rounded geometric frame or soft matte border element, matching the scene's vinyl texture, cleanly framing the composition before transitioning seamlessly into the flat {{background_color}} backdrop.
